query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, p.startDate, p.checkInDay
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN client_profiles p ON p.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Jake%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3K2x4Mgy2RpvvVT.root --database HZf6zqYa94nKHY3YxXLHa5 --execute 
SELECT u.id, u.name, p.startDate, p.checkInDay
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN client_profiles p ON p.userId = u.id
